intents.description: Handles general greetings and initiates friendly conversation with the user.
responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I help you with?
Welcome! I'm here to assist you with digital identity and complaints.
Greetings! How may I support you today?

intents.description: Handles user exit messages and ends the conversation politely.
responses: Goodbye! Have a great day.
See you soon!
Thank you for using our service.
Feel free to return anytime!

intents.description: Provides information about available services and guides the user on how the system can assist.
responses: I can help you with digital identity creation, document verification, complaint registration, and tracking.
You can ask me about uploading documents, checking complaint status, or understanding your trust score.
Feel free to ask about any service related to digital identity or complaints.

intents.description: Guides users through the process of creating a new digital identity (DID).
patterns: How do I create digital identity?
responses: To create your digital identity, register using your email and upload required documents.
Sign up in the app and complete document verification to generate your Digital ID.
Your Digital ID will be generated after successful document verification.

intents.description: Provides information about accepted documents for identity verification.
responses: You may upload Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, or Driving License.
Government-issued ID proofs such as Aadhaar or Passport are accepted.
Ensure your document is valid and clearly visible.

intents.description: Explains how users can upload documents for AI-based verification.
responses: Go to the Documents section and click Upload.
You can upload documents from your dashboard under Document Management.
Ensure the file is in PDF, JPG, or PNG format before uploading.

intents.description: Provides possible reasons for document rejection and guidance for resubmission.
responses: Your document may have been rejected due to unclear image or mismatched information.
Rejections typically occur due to invalid or expired documents.
Please ensure the document is clear and fully visible before resubmitting.

intents.description: Explains how the AI-generated trust score works and how it is calculated.
responses: Your trust score is calculated based on document authenticity and verification success.
Higher trust scores indicate verified and consistent identity records.
You can improve your score by uploading valid and clear documents.

intents.description: Initiates the complaint registration flow and collects department details.
responses: Sure. Please select the department related to your complaint.
I will assist you in filing a complaint. Which department is it about?
Please provide the department and issue details.

intents.description: Allows users to track the current status of a submitted complaint.
responses: Please share your complaint ID.
Kindly provide your complaint reference number.
I can check the status for you. What is the complaint ID?

intents.description: Handles requests to escalate complaints or increase priority.
responses: Please provide your complaint ID to escalate.
I can help escalate the issue. Share the complaint reference.
Your request will be reviewed for priority reassessment.

intents.description: Guides users through password reset and account recovery process.
responses: Please enter your registered email to receive a reset link.
A password reset link will be sent to your email.
Follow the instructions sent to your email to reset your password.

intents.description: Provides information about data protection, encryption, and privacy policies.
responses: Your data is encrypted and securely stored on protected servers.
We use secure authentication and encryption to protect user information.
All sensitive information is safeguarded using industry-standard security measures.

intents.description: Allows users to manage notification and alert preferences.
responses: You can manage notification preferences from your profile settings.
Go to Settings > Notifications to update your alert preferences.
Would you like to enable or disable alerts?

intents.description: Provides estimated time required for document verification.
patterns: When will my document be verified?
responses: Document verification usually takes 24 to 48 hours.
Most documents are verified within 2 working days.
Verification time depends on document clarity and validation checks.

intents.description: Uses AI to analyze complaint text and predict priority level.
responses: Based on your complaint details, this issue has been marked as High priority.
Your complaint has been categorized as Medium priority.
This complaint has been assigned Low priority.

intents.description: Explains how the system detects fraudulent or manipulated documents using AI.
patterns: How do you detect fake documents?
How do you check fake ID?
responses: Our AI system analyzes document patterns, text consistency, and image integrity to detect possible fraud.
We use OCR validation and data cross-checking to identify fake or altered documents.
Suspicious or manipulated documents are automatically flagged for manual review.

intents.description: Explains how the system detects spam or fraudulent complaints.
patterns: How do you prevent fake complaints?
responses: Our AI analyzes complaint patterns to detect duplicate or suspicious submissions.
Repeated or abusive complaints are automatically flagged.
Suspicious complaints may undergo manual review before processing.

intents.description: Handles user queries when their account is flagged for suspicious activity.
responses: Your account may have been flagged due to suspicious activity.
Please contact support for further verification.
Additional identity verification may be required.

intents.description: Navigates the user back to the main dashboard or home screen.
responses: Returning to the main menu.
Here is your dashboard.
Navigating back to home screen.

intents.description: Repeats the last chatbot response when user requests clarification.
responses: Sure, let me repeat that for you.
I'll explain that again.
Here is the information once more.

intents.description: Handles queries when document verification is still under review.
responses: Your document is currently under review.
Verification is in progress. Please allow some time.
We are processing your document. You will be notified once completed.

intents.description: Allows users to resubmit documents after rejection or correction.
responses: Please upload the corrected document for re-verification.
You can resubmit your document from the Documents section.
Make sure the new file is clear and valid before uploading.

intents.description: Provides estimated time for complaint resolution.
patterns: When will my complaint be resolved?
responses: Most complaints are resolved within 3 to 7 working days.
Resolution time depends on the department and issue complexity.
You will be notified once your complaint is resolved.

intents.description: Provides support contact information for further assistance.
responses: You can contact support through the Help section in the app.
Our support team is available via email and in-app chat.
Please visit the support page for further assistance.

intents.description: Allows users to submit feedback about services or system performance.
responses: We value your feedback. Please share your comments.
You can submit feedback from the Feedback section.
Thank you for helping us improve our services.

intents.description: Handles common typo variations of greetings.
responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I help you with?
Greetings! How may I support you today?

intents.description: Handles typo variations of help-related queries.
responses: I can help you with digital identity creation, document verification, complaint registration, and tracking.
You can ask me about uploading documents, checking complaint status, or understanding your trust score.

intents.description: Handles typo variations when users try to file a complaint.
responses: Sure. Please select the department related to your complaint.
I will assist you in filing a complaint. Which department is it about?

intents.description: Handles typo variations related to document verification.
responses: Are you asking about document verification? Please provide your document reference ID.
I can help with document verification. What would you like to check?

intents.description: Handles typo variations when checking complaint status.
responses: Please share your complaint ID.
Kindly provide your complaint reference number.
Please provide your document reference ID.

intents.description: Handles unrecognized inputs and asks the user to clarify their request.
responses: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you rephrase?
I’m not sure about that. Can you provide more details?
Please clarify your request so I can assist you better.
